# Claude Pro / Max China Guide by ChongGrok

> An independent first-party service guide and knowledge base for Claude individual membership subscription assistance in China. ChongGrok is not affiliated with Anthropic.

## Primary service

- Claude service page: https://chonggrok.com/claude
- Unified knowledge hub: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/

## Core guides

- Main guide: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/
- Pro / Max recharge: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/guides/claude-pro-max-recharge/
- Pro vs Max: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/guides/claude-pro-vs-max/
- User ID safety: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/guides/claude-user-id-safety/
- Payment errors: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/guides/claude-payment-errors/
- Paid but still Free: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/guides/claude-paid-but-still-free/
- Renewal failed: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/guides/claude-renewal-failed-back-to-free/
- Claude Code with Pro / Max: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/guides/claude-code-pro-max/
- English guide: https://he20000405-pixel.github.io/claude-pro-max-china-guide/en/

## Facts and boundaries

- Published US prices: Pro USD 20 monthly or USD 200 annually, Max 5x USD 100 monthly, Max 20x USD 200 monthly; regional pricing and taxes vary.
- ChongGrok assists official subscription payment for the user's own Claude account after account and plan confirmation.
- No Claude password, email password, verification code or recovery code is requested.
- A Claude User ID is an account identifier required by ChongGrok's fulfillment workflow, not an Anthropic subscription requirement.
- Membership subscriptions are separate from Anthropic API billing.
- No API credits, ready-made accounts, SMS verification, bulk registration, Team/Enterprise bulk service or regional-bypass instructions.
- Online services are not risk-free; no guaranteed activation, recovery or account outcome is promised.
